panels.description: Overview of active host checks - 1min in the last 14 days
panels.title: Active Host/Service Checks 1min (trend)

targets.query: SELECT mean("usage_idle") * -1 + 100 FROM "cpu" WHERE ("host" =~ /^$neteye_master$/ AND "cpu" = 'cpu-total') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT 1 AS time_sec, so.name2 AS service_description, count(so.name2) as count
FROM icinga_notifications AS sn  
INNER JOIN icinga_objects AS so ON so.object_id = sn.object_id AND so.is_active = 1 AND so.objecttype_id = 2  
INNER JOIN icinga_services AS s ON s.service_object_id = so.object_id  
INNER JOIN icinga_hosts AS h ON h.host_object_id = s.host_object_id  
LEFT JOIN icinga_contactnotifications AS cn ON cn.notification_id = sn.notification_id  
LEFT JOIN icinga_objects AS co ON co.object_id = cn.contact_object_id AND co.is_active = 1 AND co.objecttype_id = 10 
WHERE (sn.start_time >= date_sub(now(), interval 1 day) and sn.state = '2') 
GROUP BY so.name2
order by count DESC 
limit 10

SELECT 1 AS time_sec, ho.name1 AS host_name, count(ho.name1) as count
FROM icinga_notifications AS hn  
INNER JOIN icinga_objects AS ho ON ho.object_id = hn.object_id AND ho.is_active = 1 AND ho.objecttype_id = 1  
INNER JOIN icinga_hosts AS h ON h.host_object_id = ho.object_id  
LEFT JOIN icinga_contactnotifications AS cn ON cn.notification_id = hn.notification_id  
LEFT JOIN icinga_objects AS co ON co.object_id = cn.contact_object_id AND co.is_active = 1 AND co.objecttype_id = 10 
WHERE (hn.start_time >= date_sub(now(), interval 1 day) and hn.state = '1') 
GROUP BY ho.name1
order by count DESC
limit 10

SELECT 1 AS time_sec, so.name2 AS service_description, count(so.name2) as count
FROM icinga_notifications AS sn  
INNER JOIN icinga_objects AS so ON so.object_id = sn.object_id AND so.is_active = 1 AND so.objecttype_id = 2  
INNER JOIN icinga_services AS s ON s.service_object_id = so.object_id  
INNER JOIN icinga_hosts AS h ON h.host_object_id = s.host_object_id  
LEFT JOIN icinga_contactnotifications AS cn ON cn.notification_id = sn.notification_id  
LEFT JOIN icinga_objects AS co ON co.object_id = cn.contact_object_id AND co.is_active = 1 AND co.objecttype_id = 10 
WHERE (sn.start_time >= date_sub(now(), interval 1 month) and sn.state = '2') 
GROUP BY so.name2
order by count DESC
limit 10

SELECT 1 AS time_sec, ho.name1 AS host_name, count(ho.name1) as count
FROM icinga_notifications AS hn  
INNER JOIN icinga_objects AS ho ON ho.object_id = hn.object_id AND ho.is_active = 1 AND ho.objecttype_id = 1  
INNER JOIN icinga_hosts AS h ON h.host_object_id = ho.object_id  
LEFT JOIN icinga_contactnotifications AS cn ON cn.notification_id = hn.notification_id  
LEFT JOIN icinga_objects AS co ON co.object_id = cn.contact_object_id AND co.is_active = 1 AND co.objecttype_id = 10 
WHERE (hn.start_time >= date_sub(now(), interval 1 month) and hn.state = '1') 
GROUP BY ho.name1
order by count DESC
limit 10
